summary: Tested SwarmSim AI Enhancements: belief tracking, emotional contagion, network effects (hubs/peripherals), batch post generation, round narratives with herd detection, and quality scoring. All new agent modules (belief_tracker, emotional_contagion, network, critic) pass unit tests. E2E API flow verified: live-fetch returns 202, simulation-status returns belief_summary/emotional_summary/network_stats/round_narratives, posts include is_hub_post/belief_position/emotional_valence, report includes quality_score/quality_feedback/overconfident/quality_issues. Frontend UI verified: mode toggle, agent slider max=300, EmotionalTemperatureGauge, SentimentChart, HUB badges, belief indicators, quality-score-badge, story-arc.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 errors from Claude API (retry logic handles it)

passed_tests: Agent slider max is 300 (verified in UI and API accepts num_agents=300)
GET /api/sessions/{id}/live-status returns completed with graph (18 entities, 30 relationships)
POST /api/sessions/{id}/generate-agents completes with agents (12 agents in test)
GET /api/sessions/{id}/simulation-status returns round_narratives (list of narrative strings)
Simulation posts include belief_position field (float -1 to 1)
Simulation posts include emotional_valence field (float -1 to 1)
Frontend EmotionalTemperatureGauge component visible during simulation (data-testid='emotional-temperature')
Frontend SentimentChart component visible during simulation (data-testid='sentiment-chart')
Frontend PostCard shows HUB badge for hub posts
Frontend PostCard shows belief indicator (+ support / - oppose / ~ undecided)
Unit test: initialise_beliefs adds belief_state to agents
Unit test: get_belief_summary returns support/opposition/undecided percentages
Unit test: initialise_emotions adds emotional_state to agents
Unit test: check_herd detects herd behavior (70%+ same sentiment)
Unit test: score_diversity calculates entropy-based diversity score
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new agent modules (belief_tracker, emotional_contagion, network, critic) are well-structured with clear functions
Belief tracking uses weighted influence-based position updates with certainty decay
Emotional contagion uses personality-based susceptibility for realistic emotion spread
Network module assigns ~10% of agents as hubs with Pareto-distributed follower counts
Critic module provides herd detection (70% threshold) and diversity scoring (entropy-based)
Batch post generation (BATCH_SIZE=10) reduces Claude API calls significantly
Round narratives provide good context for simulation progression
Quality scoring in reports uses pure Python (no LLM call) for fast evaluation

success_rate.backend: 100% (all API endpoints and agent modules working correctly)

test_credentials: No auth required. Uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY from backend .env.
seed_data_creation: None - tests create their own sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI enhancements fully tested. Key new features: (1) belief_tracker module tracks agent belief positions (-1 to 1) with certainty, (2) emotional_contagion module tracks valence/arousal with personality-based susceptibility, (3) network module assigns hub/peripheral status with ~10% hubs, (4) critic module provides herd detection and diversity scoring. Simulation posts now include is_hub_post, belief_position, emotional_valence fields. Reports include quality_score (1-10), quality_feedback, overconfident flag, and quality_issues list. Frontend shows EmotionalTemperatureGauge, SentimentChart, HUB badges on posts, belief indicators, story-arc in report, and quality-score-badge. Agent slider max is 300. Minimum simulation rounds is 3.
